options.a: The period from the end of evening civil twilight and the beginning of morning civil twilight, or any other time between the sunset and sunrise as prescribed by the authority.
options.b: The period from the beginning of evening civil twilight and the end of morning civil twilight, or any other period between the sunset and sunrise as prescribed by the authority.
options.c: The period between the sunset and the sunrise, or any other time between the end of the evening civil twilight and the end of the morning twilight as prescribed by the authority.
options.d: The period from the beginning of evening civil twilight and the beginning of morning civil twilight, or any other time between the sunset and sunrise as prescribed by the authority.
